highlights.text: Readers were well prepared and I wrote last Wednesday at 4pm: “ “Bull case tomorrow: The macro pattern remains a large triangle pattern shown in bolded yellow below with resistance just a little above 6766 and support down at 6605…..At 2pm today, ES put in a Failed Breakdown under 6698 and ripped us higher.
The bull case tomorrow is that ES can resume up to backtest 6766 again.
I wrote at the close Monday: “I defer to the trend.
When it comes to entries, it is always the same for me: I trade Failed Breakdowns (these represent institutional accumulation), then I leave runners.
I wrote last Tuesday at 4pm (over one week ago): “The best setup here is to wait for the Failed Breakdown of Sunday’s 6694 daily low.
We flushed 90 points down to 6690, Failed Breakdown, recovered 6694 and the leg up began which then broke us out the triangle.
I wrote yesterday: “Otherwise, the obvious setup is the Failed Breakdown of todays low(s).
After that if bulls have the momentum, we can head higher to 6782, then we likely head to all time highs after .” We certainly got to all time highs.

post_title: FOMC Brings The First SPX Dip In 1 Week. Was That It, Or More Red Ahead? Oct 30 Plan
